title: Process body fluid specimens using a point of care testing device
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Process body fluid specimens using a point of care testing device demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Complete pre-analytics

pcs.text: Confirm correct patient identification in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm correct patient identification in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm correct patient identification in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify collection method and confirm specimen type has been approved for testing based on manufacturer requirements and workplace procedures.
